# Status App: Private Messenger, Assets, Web Browser, Communities and more

> Status App combines end-to-end encrypted messaging, community spaces, asset management, and a secure web browser in one private peer-to-peer app.

## Core Pages
- [Status App](https://get.status.app/): Chat privately without surveillance. Combine censorship resistant communications with a private web browser in one secure app.
- [Status App Downloads](https://get.status.app/apps): Use Status on mobile and desktop for private messaging, assets, communities, and browsing.
- [Privacy Policy](https://get.status.app/legal/privacy-policy): Review how Status handles website privacy and analytics.
- [Terms of Use](https://get.status.app/legal/terms-of-use): Review the website terms for Status App.
